spec.title: Daemon DB Ops / s
spec.description: Observed daemon SQLite operation throughput across async and sync paths.

spec.title: Recent Daemon Sessions
spec.description: Recent daemon sessions directly from the live SQLite database.

spec.queryText: SELECT session_id, title, status, last_activity_at, updated_at FROM sessions ORDER BY COALESCE(last_activity_at, updated_at) DESC LIMIT 20
spec.rawQueryText: SELECT session_id, title, status, last_activity_at, updated_at FROM sessions ORDER BY COALESCE(last_activity_at, updated_at) DESC LIMIT 20

spec.title: Daemon Open Tasks
spec.description: Open daemon work items ordered by severity and freshness.

spec.queryText: SELECT task_id, title, severity, status, assigned_to, updated_at FROM tasks WHERE status != 'done' ORDER BY CASE severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 0 WHEN 'high' THEN 1 WHEN 'medium' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, updated_at DESC LIMIT 20
spec.rawQueryText: SELECT task_id, title, severity, status, assigned_to, updated_at FROM tasks WHERE status != 'done' ORDER BY CASE severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 0 WHEN 'high' THEN 1 WHEN 'medium' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, updated_at DESC LIMIT 20

spec.title: Daemon Event Log
spec.description: Recent daemon event log entries from the persisted database.

spec.queryText: SELECT recorded_at, level, message FROM daemon_events ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 50
spec.rawQueryText: SELECT recorded_at, level, message FROM daemon_events ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 50

spec.expr: ((histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(harness_daemon_db_operation_duration_milliseconds_bucket[5m]))) and on() (sum(rate(harness_daemon_db_operation_duration_milliseconds_count[5m])) > 0)) or on() vector(0))

spec.title: Monitor Cache Freshness
spec.description: Recent cache refreshes and UI views from the monitor cache store.

spec.queryText: SELECT ZSESSIONID AS session_id, ZSTATUSRAW AS status, datetime(ZLASTCACHEDAT + 978307200, 'unixepoch') AS last_cached_at, datetime(ZLASTVIEWEDAT + 978307200, 'unixepoch') AS last_viewed_at FROM ZCACHEDSESSION ORDER BY ZLASTCACHEDAT DESC LIMIT 20
spec.rawQueryText: SELECT ZSESSIONID AS session_id, ZSTATUSRAW AS status, datetime(ZLASTCACHEDAT + 978307200, 'unixepoch') AS last_cached_at, datetime(ZLASTVIEWEDAT + 978307200, 'unixepoch') AS last_viewed_at FROM ZCACHEDSESSION ORDER BY ZLASTCACHEDAT DESC LIMIT 20

spec.title: Cached Work Items
spec.description: Cached work items as seen by the monitor client.

spec.queryText: SELECT ZTASKID AS task_id, ZTITLE AS title, ZSEVERITYRAW AS severity, ZSTATUSRAW AS status, ZASSIGNEDTO AS assigned_to, ZUPDATEDAT AS updated_at FROM ZCACHEDWORKITEM ORDER BY ZUPDATEDAT DESC LIMIT 20
spec.rawQueryText: SELECT ZTASKID AS task_id, ZTITLE AS title, ZSEVERITYRAW AS severity, ZSTATUSRAW AS status, ZASSIGNEDTO AS assigned_to, ZUPDATEDAT AS updated_at FROM ZCACHEDWORKITEM ORDER BY ZUPDATEDAT DESC LIMIT 20

spec.title: Cached Agent Activity
spec.description: Aggregated tool activity cached by runtime in the monitor store.

spec.queryText: SELECT ZRUNTIME AS runtime, SUM(ZTOOLINVOCATIONCOUNT) AS tool_calls, SUM(ZTOOLERRORCOUNT) AS tool_errors, MAX(ZLATESTEVENTAT) AS latest_event FROM ZCACHEDAGENTACTIVITY GROUP BY ZRUNTIME ORDER BY tool_calls DESC
spec.rawQueryText: SELECT ZRUNTIME AS runtime, SUM(ZTOOLINVOCATIONCOUNT) AS tool_calls, SUM(ZTOOLERRORCOUNT) AS tool_errors, MAX(ZLATESTEVENTAT) AS latest_event FROM ZCACHEDAGENTACTIVITY GROUP BY ZRUNTIME ORDER BY tool_calls DESC

spec.title: Daemon Busy / s
spec.description: Busy/locked daemon SQLite retries per second.

spec.title: Daemon DB Size
spec.description: Combined daemon SQLite file size including main, WAL, and SHM files when present.

spec.title: Monitor Cache Ops / s
spec.description: Observed monitor cache SQLite operation throughput.

spec.title: Monitor Cache p95
spec.description: Observed monitor cache SQLite p95 latency.

spec.expr: ((histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(harness_monitor_sqlite_operation_duration_ms_bucket[5m]))) and on() (sum(rate(harness_monitor_sqlite_operation_duration_ms_count[5m])) > 0)) or on() vector(0))

spec.title: Monitor Cache Size
spec.description: Monitor cache SQLite file size, including WAL and SHM files.

spec.title: Exporter Errors / s
spec.description: Exporter-side query failures across the daemon and monitor SQLite targets.
